positive: A whimsical, stylized jungle biome print featuring detailed silhouettes of exotic fauna (monkeys, toucans, gentle leopards) interwoven with lush, oversized tropical leaves and flowering vines. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, maximizing negative space for clean apparel placement. Use a vibrant, jewel-toned color palette (deep emerald green, sapphire blue, royal purple, and pops of gold and coral). The style must be a clean vector illustration aesthetic, combining the intricate detail of Art Nouveau with the bold, graphic impact of modern screen printing. Focus on strong outlines and high contrast against a subtle background color, ensuring the final image reads as a repeatable, seamless textile pattern, perfect for commercial printing. Cinematic, high detail, clean linework, flat design elements.
